scene_title: Build suspense and establish the threat level of the palace guards.
purpose: Build suspense and establish the threat level of the palace guards.
summary: While navigating the labyrinthine palace, Carter hides and overhears guards discussing the massacre in the antechamber. He then listens to Than Kosis and Notan discuss the mysterious, superhuman man on the loose.

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH022_SC005

- chapter_id: `CH022`
- scene_title: `Build suspense and establish the threat level of the palace guards.`

## Production Intent

Build suspense and establish the threat level of the palace guards.

## Storyboard

While navigating the labyrinthine palace, Carter hides and overhears guards discussing the massacre in the antechamber. He then listens to Than Kosis and Notan discuss the mysterious, superhuman man on the loose.
